name: majia-guanyuan
displayName: 观远 BI · 马甲实战版
description: Tool-agnostic Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Hermes skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Four capabilities: data query & card creation (Part A), ETL governance & write (Part B, incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite & ExecPlan), custom chart HTML/JS injection & debugging (Part C-1..11), and V2.1.1's new HTML application-style dashboard generation (Part C-12, SDK subtype + DATA_GRID dataView layer + descriptor-level selector linkage patch). Battle-tested with 60+ ETL operations and a 41-card production HTML application dashboard. Progressive disclosure keeps SKILL.md as the router and references/ + templates/ as detailed playbooks. Install via `gh skill`, `git clone` + `node bin/install.js install`, `npx github:maojiebc/majia-guanyuan install`, or ClawHub/OpenClaw.
author: maojiebc

triggers._note: Legacy field kept for backward compatibility. The single source of truth for triggering is SKILL.md frontmatter `description`. All known target agents (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes) read description, not manifest.triggers — keeping these in sync was overhead. Refresh from SKILL.md description if you intend to consume them.
